qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist A (serial #13) raises D-round density to at least 6 regex-patch operations per round

executionHints.description: Checklist A (serial #13) focuses on dense helper extraction and decision-field routing to increase per-round source delta

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, explicit reset avoids stale invocation state

D1.description: Centralize observation reason/confidence literals and route reason-key prefix through shared literal helpers

operations.pattern: static const char\* wc_preclass_observe_reason_code\(const char\* reason\)

static const char\* wc_preclass_observe_reason_code\(const char\* reason\)?
\{?
	if \(!reason \|\| !\*reason\)?
		return "NON_IP_INPUT";?
	return reason;?
\}
static const char\* wc_preclass_observe_reason_key\(const char\* reason\)\r?\n\{\r?\n\tstatic const char\* prefix = "PRECLASS_REASON_";

D2.description: Increase input-label routing density with match-layer predicates and action-source literal reuse

operations.pattern:
static const char\* wc_preclass_input_label_from_match_layer\(const char\* match_layer\)?
\{?
	if \(match_layer && strcmp\(match_layer, wc_preclass_match_layer_cidr_compare_literal\(\)\) == 0\)?
		return wc_preclass_match_layer_cidr_compare_literal\(\);?
	if \(match_layer && strcmp\(match_layer, wc_preclass_match_layer_ip_compare_literal\(\)\) == 0\)?
		return wc_preclass_match_layer_ip_compare_literal\(\);?
	return wc_preclass_non_ip_literal\(\);?
\}

D3.description: Densify decision resolution by introducing apply helpers for disabled/decision/route-change branches

D4.description: Increase classification delta by adding reusable v4/v6 assignment helpers and applying them to hot branches
